name: Shotshape Golf Studio - Uptown
about: Shotshape Golf Studio - Uptown is Minneapolis' only premiere and private golf simulator venue. Designed with the golfer in mind, members gain access to the best technology in the industry in a space that is entirely their own during a reservation. The studio operates on a 24/7, 365-day-a-year schedule, ensuring members can refine their golf game at their convenience, regardless of the time, season, or weather. With a limited membership to guarantee availability, Shotshape offers an environment suitable for everything from beginner practice to professional game optimization.
why_golfers_like_it: Complete privacy with the entire studio reserved exclusively for you and your guests
24/7 access with Bluetooth key entry for ultimate flexibility and convenience
Premium Trackman technology for detailed data-based swing analysis and course play

food_and_drink.notes: Members are welcome to bring or order their own food; a cleaning policy is in place to leave the studio trash-free for the next member.
Members are welcome to bring their own beverages; a mini fridge is provided to keep drinks cool.

simulator_hardware.notes: Industry-leading radar launch monitor providing detailed ball and club data analysis.

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own golf clubs?
faq.answer: Yes, members are expected to bring their own golf clubs to use in the simulator bay.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drink?
faq.answer: Yes, members are welcome to bring or order their own food and drinks. A mini fridge is provided for beverages, and members must clean up after themselves.

faq.question: How long does it typically take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The time to play 18 virtual holes can vary depending on the player's pace and the course, but it generally takes one to two hours.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: The venue is not specifically marketed or designed as kid-friendly; it is primarily a private golf studio for adults focusing on serious practice and play.
